race.comment: Tricky little 2yo affair. EXACTING STANDARD (3) ran a great race on debut at Bendigo, showing speed over the 1000m and boxing on well for a narrow second. He should come on from that and take catching. ATTENTION PLEASE (6) is a filly by Microphone on debut for the Yeomans yard who has been jumping out well here and can figure with Jamie Melham booked. FONTEIN JEWEL (4) fair effort last start, beaten 2.25 lengths into fourth over 1100m at Bendigo. Fitter third-up and worth consideration. OPUNAKE (5) first starter from the Mark Walker yard. Impressive trial winner on May 14 at Caulfield Heath over 1000m. Looks ready to make a solid debut.
